title: This Shrimp Can Crack Aquarium Glass With One Punch
script: This shrimp throws a punch fast enough to boil the water around it. The peacock mantis shrimp. Its club-like claws accelerate faster than a twenty-two caliber bullet, so fast the strike creates a flash of light and a shockwave that can crack aquarium glass from across the tank. Marine biologists keep them in reinforced tanks for exactly that reason. That single punch can shatter crab shells, snail shells, even its own prey's bones in one hit, and it can throw that punch dozens of times before resetting. Aquarium keepers call it the thumb splitter because of what happens if you reach into its tank. What animal on Earth hits harder for its size than this?
